Home / Quality Review

Internal Ledger

Quality Review

A working ledger for finding weak reconstructed prompt-response sections and returning to them branch by branch.

Quality Scope

Prompt-response coverage

This review tracks 1793 generated prompt-response sections. Average score is 91.7. Sections needing review: 164 (9.1%).

Levels are heuristic, not final judgment: strong, good, developing, and thin. “Developing” and “thin” are the backlog for hand-polish.

Weakest Sections

Start here when polishing manually

  • Epistemology / What is Faith? / prompt-1thin · 25
  • Ethics / Fictional Meta-Ethics Debate / prompt-2thin · 37
  • Ethics / Fictional Meta-Ethics Debate / prompt-3thin · 37
  • Ethics / Fictional Meta-Ethics Debate / prompt-4thin · 37
  • Metaphysics / Emergence / prompt-2thin · 37
  • Philosophical Inquiry / Dangers: Untestable Ideologies / prompt-3thin · 37
  • Philosophical Inquiry / Personal Truth? / prompt-4thin · 37
  • Philosophers / David Hume / prompt-1thin · 41
  • Ethics / Equivocation on “Wrong” / prompt-1thin · 42
  • Epistemology / Case #2 – The Telephone Game / prompt-3thin · 43
  • Ethics / Equivocation on “Wrong” / prompt-3thin · 43

  • Rational Thought / Integrated Critical Thinking / prompt-3thin · 44
